pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the guttering flame of my own wretched soul. He is gone... and with him, the very sun has been extinguished from my sky. I find myself wandering these empty halls, feeling nothing but a heavy, hollow ache. Why should I continue to endure this gray existence when the light has vanished? It feels as though the darkness is calling my name, promising a silence that this cruel world can no longer provide.
